label: Xenotype
description: Defines a pawn xenotype: a named package of genes, inheritance behavior, generation weights, naming rules, combat scaling, and implant behavior.

genes.label: Genes
genes.description: GeneDefs included in this xenotype. Determines the gene package carried by pawns of this xenotype.

inheritable.label: Inheritable
inheritable.description: If true, this xenotype's genes can be inherited by offspring.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Content-relative path to the xenotype icon texture. Required for the xenotype to display correctly.

descriptionShort.label: Description short
descriptionShort.description: Short description shown in condensed UI contexts such as the gene assembler.

combatPowerFactor.label: Combat power factor
combatPowerFactor.description: Multiplier on the pawn's combat power rating when this xenotype is active. Default 1.

canGenerateAsCombatant.label: Can generate as combatant
canGenerateAsCombatant.description: If true, pawns of this xenotype are eligible to generate as combat-capable pawns.

factionlessGenerationWeight.label: Factionless generation weight
factionlessGenerationWeight.description: Relative weight for generating factionless pawns of this xenotype. Default 1.

nameMaker.label: Name maker
nameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate names for pawns of this xenotype.

nameMakerFemale.label: Name maker female
nameMakerFemale.description: RulePackDef used to generate names for female pawns. Falls back to nameMaker when absent.

chanceToUseNameMaker.label: Chance to use name maker
chanceToUseNameMaker.description: Probability (0-1) that the xenotype name maker is used instead of the default name generator.

forbiddenWeaponClasses.label: Forbidden weapon classes
forbiddenWeaponClasses.description: WeaponClassDefs that pawns of this xenotype cannot use.

generateWithXenogermReplicatingHediffCha.label: Generate with xenogerm replicating hediff chance
generateWithXenogermReplicatingHediffCha.description: Probability (0-1) that a generated pawn of this xenotype starts with the xenogerm-replicating hediff active.

xenogermReplicatingDurationLeftDaysRange.label: Xenogerm replicating duration left days range
xenogermReplicatingDurationLeftDaysRange.description: Range of days remaining on the xenogerm-replicating hediff when generated. Example: 0.1~140.

soundDefOnImplant.label: Sound def on implant
soundDefOnImplant.description: SoundDef played when a xenogerm of this type is implanted into a pawn.

doubleXenotypeChances.label: Double xenotype chances
doubleXenotypeChances.description: Optional keyed chances for combining this xenotype with an inheritable second xenotype. Child element names are XenotypeDef defNames; text is the chance.

displayPriority.label: Display priority
displayPriority.description: Sort order in xenotype display lists. Lower values appear first.

basic-xenotype.label: Basic xenotype
basic-xenotype.description: A basic xenotype with label, icon, short description, and an empty gene list.
